channel_about:
I showcase my life’s journey and unboxing brands and tools I love & use.
Also I ❤️ Watches and Hobby Grade RC cars, 
so I have some crazy content to share here 😆

Hi, My name is Jason 
also known as “The Branded Artist” 
from Mumbai.

✨ I am an Artist who Admire Brands ✨

I have been tattooing professionally for the last 14 years & I hold 4 World Records 🔥
for Officially being “The Most Brand Logos Tattooed Human on Earth” (542 tattoos in total)
Note : Not any random logos, These are those brands which has some impact on my life.

If possible, Do let me know if you have any specific video requests 
Thank you & take care 😊
.
.
.
email : heybrandedboy@gmail.com
Instagram : @21brandedboy & @21tattoostudio

top_comments.author: @SkinnwalkerNG
top_comments.text: Honest comment. Willys Jeep is just a plastic toy but it has the vibe worth of 8k. That tank300 I mean why does that car even exist in real life, it's a jeep copy. But the rc model is good, you got openable parts for 13k, though the colour feels unreal. And that Jeep wrangler oh boy, the detailing for 13k is feeling insane, worth the price and its FMS at the end of the day so it's good. And honest picks, MN82pro or MN82S 😂 u see MN82 or MN82PRO is way too realistic and colour feels insane and it's a black canvas for customisation, while the MN82S is is bit better performant for 6k to 10k. And there's new LDRC18401 Pro which is best performing at crawling, and LD1297 another new one which feels more realistic. My pick will be that wrangler for the detailing.

channel_about:
Daddy Drones is India’s #1 Drone & RC Hobby Store, based in Mumbai and trusted by hobbyists across India. We offer drones, RC cars, crawlers, boats, planes, and hobby collectibles for beginners and pros.

Our mission is to make high-quality RC gear accessible and affordable with expert guidance, demos, and after-sales support. Every order is tested, packed, and shipped with care. Same-day delivery available in Mumbai and nationwide shipping across India.

We stock top brands like MJX, WLtoys, Rlaarlo, Huina, FMS, Turbo Racing, and more. Subscribe for product demos, reviews, unboxings, and tips to join India’s fastest-growing RC community!

Shop now: www.daddydrones.in

WhatsApp Support: 7208204541
Follow us on Instagram: @daddydronesmumbai

⚠️ Safety Note: Not for kids. Always wear eye protection while using.

videos.title: India’s most affordable RC Crawler Copy of Traxxas TRX4 Defender at MRC Hobbies #rccrawler #rcindia
videos.description:
Welcome back to MRC Hobbies! In today's video, we're unboxing the highly anticipated RC Crawler Defender by Rally Racing. This beast is known for its rugged design and exceptional off-road capabilities. Join us as we take a close look at what makes this RC crawler a must-have for enthusiasts.

**What's in the Box:**
- RC Crawler Defender by Rally Racing
- Detailed user manual
- High-torque motor
- 2.4GHz radio system
- Durable chassis and suspension system
- High-grip all-terrain tires
- Rechargeable battery pack and charger

**Key Features:**
- Realistic Defender body shell with intricate details
- 4WD system for superior traction and control
- Adjustable suspension for tackling various terrains
- Waterproof electronics for all-weather performance
- High-torque motor for powerful crawling action
- 2.4GHz radio system for precise control and extended range

**First Impressions:**
We'll give you a first-hand look at the build quality, design, and performance potential of the RC Crawler Defender. Stay tuned as we test its capabilities on different terrains in our upcoming videos.

**Stay Connected:**
If you enjoyed this unboxing, make sure to like, comment, and subscribe to MRC Hobbies. Hit the bell icon to get notified about our latest uploads. Follow us on our social media channels for behind-the-scenes content and more!

**Links:**
- MRC Hobbies YouTube Channel- https://www.youtube.com/MRCHobbies
- Follow us on Instagram- https://www.instagram.com/MRCHobbies

videos.title: Best RCcar Championship Of India | Nagpur by MRC Hobbies
videos.description:
Get ready for some high-speed action as the RC Racing enthusiasts of Nagpur take over St. Vincent Pallotti College in this thrilling event held in January 2025! Watch as students and racers from across the city come together to compete in an adrenaline-pumping race featuring high-performance remote-controlled cars.

In this video, we showcase the excitement, passion, and skill of the participants as they navigate through the challenging track set up at the heart of the campus. With a range of modified RC cars, custom-built designs, and strategic racing techniques, this event promises a true test of speed and precision.
This event not only showcased the love for RC racing but also brought together a community of passionate individuals who enjoy the thrill of motorsport on a miniature scale. Whether you’re an RC racing enthusiast or just curious about this unique sport, this video captures all the highlights from the event at St. Vincent Pallotti College, Nagpur.

🔔 Stay tuned for more action-packed RC racing content! Don’t forget to:

Like this video if you enjoyed the race!
Comment below to let us know which car or racer impressed you the most.
Share the excitement with your friends and fellow racing fans!
Subscribe to our channel for more thrilling motorsport videos!
Hit the bell icon so you never miss an update!
👉 Follow Us on Social Media:

Instagram: @https://www.instagram.com/mrchobbies/?hl=en

👉 Check out our other related videos:

Explore the amazing variety of toys and decoration items starting from just ₹2 at the wholesale toy market in Nallasopara, Mumbai. In this vlog, we'll take you through the bustling lanes of Nallasopara's toy market, where you can find everything from toy cars to unique decorative pieces at unbelievably low prices. Whether you're looking for gifts for kids or bulk purchases for your business, this market is the perfect spot for affordable shopping. Don't miss out on the fantastic deals available here!

End Part:
Thank you for watching! If you enjoyed this tour of Nallasopara's wholesale toy market, don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe to our channel BusinessPUR for more market tours and shopping tips. Follow us on Facebook and Instagram (@BusinessPUR) for the latest updates on the best shopping spots around.

channel_about:
Multirotor and Drone enthusiast with a passion for FPV and all things RC. Lately I've been hooked on building and drifting Mini RC Cars of different scale sizes. I have 13 years of experience flying, tuning and building drones from scratch and love throwing FPV (First Person View) into everything. I also build and fly micro jets and helicopters, as well as micro cars and boats. This channel will mostly cover small R/C Drift Cars, showing videos on building, upgrading, drifting, racing and flying as much as I can. 
I also have my part 107 certification.

channel_about:
🚗 Welcome to the Desi RC Garage Universe! 🏁 Are you obsessed with RC cars, remote control trucks, RC drift cars, or nitro-powered beasts? You’ve just found your new favorite pit stop! This channel is your go-to destination for everything remote control car related—from RC racing and off-road RC adventures to unboxings, reviews, speed tests, and custom builds.

🔥 We dive into the world of RC 4x4, RC monster trucks, RC buggies, and fast RC cars. Whether you're into RC drift, RC stunt cars, or just looking for the best RC cars for beginners, we’ve got you covered.

🎮 Join our growing community of RC enthusiasts, remote control car racers, and RC lover. Subscribe now and hit the bell so you never miss a high-speed showdown, RC car mod, or track day vlog.

In this video, we are taking a look at a new RC Porsche car. This is an All Wheel Drive remote control car with 2 sets of tyres. A set of grip tyres and a set of drift tyres. It comes with a rechargeable battery and it's super fun to play.

Buying link: https://beebom.store

Subscribe to ‪@beebomco‬ for more videos like this.

videos.title: BEST Remote Control Drift Car Unboxing and Review - Small RC Porsche
videos.description:
A Video Of a Small Porsche Remote Control Drift Car Quick Unboxing and Review By *UNBOX MSR*

Hello and welcome to *Unbox Msr!* In today’s video, we’re going to Unboxing a small 1: 24 Scale Porsche Drift car with replacement tiers. If you're interested in an rc car especially Drift then this video is for you.

An *RC drift car* is a specialized radio-controlled car designed to slide sideways (drift) through corners, mimicking the style of real-life drifting. These cars typically feature:  

- *Rear-wheel drive (RWD) or all-wheel drive (AWD)* setups for controlled slides.  
- *Slick or hard plastic tires* to reduce grip and enhance sliding.  
- *Adjustable suspension and steering* for precise control.  
- *Lightweight chassis* (often made of carbon fiber or high-grade plastic).  
- *Powerful brushless motors* for smooth acceleration.  

*What You'll Discover:*
- rc drift car Unboxing
- drift car Test and fun play
- fun With rc car
- some drifting moments
- quick unboxing and review 
- What's Inside The Drift car and remote
- Drifting and driving 

You Can Buy This Car From Ebay, Amazon, Alibaba, AliExpress, E-shops, Online, Facebook Page and many other place!

top_comments.author: @DD-k6o
top_comments.text:
Thank you for your video, particularly your tear-down (opening up). I believe this chassis is used for various models including the ZLL SG204 (Lancis Delta), SG216 (Ford Focus) and SG219 (Citroen). 

Your video shows that these chassis having full proportional throttle and steering is marketing nonsense, at best is two stage throttle/steering, i.e., off, half, full. 

I'm not saying it is bad or unsurprising given the price point of these cars, I just wish it wasn't so difficult to cut through the marketing exaggeration to find out exactly what features these cars have.

Still, really helpful of you, thank you.

videos.title: Best Affordable RC Drift Car in India 🔥
videos.description:
Buying link in bio! 🔗

This is one of the best affordable RC drift cars you can buy in India. 

Just pop in the included rechargeable battery into the car, turn on the car and the remote, and that's it. You can start driving. You can turn the lights on or off, and it also has two speed modes so you can drive fast, and you can drive really fast as well. 

Plus, you get drift tires pre-installed on the car for drifting on smooth surfaces, and you also get grippy tires in the box which you can install easily to drive on rough surfaces or for drag racing with other RC cars.

It comes with proportional throttle and proportional steering so you can actually control your drift easily and it's a lot of fun to drive.

Check it out from the link in the bio! 

#8bittoast #toastyvideos

channel_about:
Nature, Architecture and Divine are the three aspects around which our daily lives revolve.

This channel aims to bring forth the essence of all the three through shorts depicting the architectural beauties, travel spots, spiritual places, culturally rich alleys & places of historical significance.

Join me on the journey to uncover the hidden gems of nature & architecture in and around our cities of India.

New YouTube shorts are posted on the channel everyday (Usually After 11.30 A.M.).

Please do like,share, subscribe and comment on my videos, if you like my content.

Do check the written posts for more detailed information about the YouTube Shorts posted everyday.

Look out for a "Special YouTube Short" listing the places visited during the week every Saturday (by 8.45 A.M.) other than the shorts  posted everyday on the channel (Usually Five YouTube Shorts per day).

Thank you, God bless You all!

videos.title: Lohar Chawl, South Mumbai.
videos.description:
This is the Famous Lohar Chawl market.

It is located in Kalbadevi Area (Near Dhobitalao, Marine Lines, South Mumbai) & Near Crawford Market ( Now known as Mahatma Phule Market).

It is a wholesale market that caters to all the electrical needs such as bulbs,fans,lights, switches, electrical cables etc.

Prices here are very affordable, it attracts crowds from all over the city for the same.

The nearest stations are Marine Lines on the Western line and C.S.M.T on the central Line of Mumbai.

About Video - Lohar Chawl is a famous wholesale electronic market in Mumbai. It has many shops dealing with new and old electronics items, such as mobile phones, accessories, light fixtures, cables, wires, etc. You can find a variety of products at low prices, but you have to bargain well and be careful about the quality and authenticity of the items. Lohar Chawl is located near Crawford Market in Kalbadevi area. It is open from 10 am to 10 pm every Monday to Saturday1. You can reach there by bus, train or taxi from any part of Mumbai.

videos.description:
#LoharChawl #BusinessOpportunity #CheapestLightsMarket #vijaybagwevlogs

10 रुपयांपासून दिवाळी Lights 😍 | सर्वात स्वस्त Lighting Market | Lohar Chawl Mumbai 2025

नमस्कार मित्रांनो,
दिवाळी जवळ आली आहे आणि सजावटीसाठी तुम्ही शोधत आहात स्वस्त व मस्त Lights?
या व्हिडिओमध्ये आपण घेऊन आलो आहोत Lohar Chawl, Mumbai मधील सर्वात प्रसिद्ध Lighting Market — जिथे 10Rs पासून सुरू होतात अप्रतिम दिवाळी Lights, LED, Series, Lanterns आणि Decorative Items!

पत्ता: ओम शिव इलेक्ट्रिकल्स, देवकरण मॅन्शन इमारत क्र. ९, ग्राऊंड फ्लोअर, पाठक वाडी, लोहार चाळ, मुंबई
संपर्क: ९६१९७५३३९५
वेळ: सकाळी १० ते रात्री ९

येथे तुम्हाला मिळतील:
10Rs पासून सुरू होणारे LED Lights
Decorative Lanterns आणि Hanging Lights
Diwali Series Lights आणि Fancy Decoration Items

videos.title: १५ वर्ष जुन्या गाडीचे RC Renewal कसे करायचे ? 🚗✅ | How to RC Renewal After 15 Years ? 🏍️
videos.description:
#RCRenewal #VehicleRCUpdate #15YearOldVehicle

📢 Is your vehicle’s RC (Registration Certificate) about to expire after 15 years? Don't worry! This video explains how to renew your vehicle’s RC step by step.

१५ वर्ष जुन्या गाडीचे RC Renewal कसे करायचे ? | How to Renew vehicle RC After 15 Years? : https://youtu.be/3O9y54Lb-WY

गाडीच्या RC मध्ये मोबाईल नंबर ONLINE UPDATE | LINK होत नसेल तर OFFLINE कसा Link करायचा? : https://youtu.be/CY402niTWqc

गाडीच्या RC मध्ये मोबाईल नंबर LINK कसा Link करायचा? | How to link mobile number in (RC) online? : https://youtu.be/VEFETp3CIRo

✅ In this video, you will learn:
🔹 Why is RC renewal necessary after 15 years?
🔹 Step-by-step online & offline process
🔹 Required documents & fees
🔹 What is a Fitment Test?
🔹 Penalties for not renewing RC

🚦 Renew your RC on time and avoid fines! Watch the full video to get complete details.

🚘 Why is RC Renewal Required After 15 Years?
According to the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988, in India, every vehicle’s Registration Certificate (RC) expires after 15 years. If you want to continue using your vehicle beyond this period, you must renew your RC to ensure compliance with the law.

🚦 What Happens If You Don’t Renew Your RC?
❌ Traffic police can stop and fine you.
❌ Your vehicle might get seized by authorities.
❌ Your insurance becomes invalid after RC expiry.
❌ You may fail pollution control tests and violate environmental laws.

✔️ To avoid legal issues, renew your RC before it expires!

📌 How to Renew Your Vehicle’s RC After 15 Years? (Step-by-Step Process)
You can renew your RC both online and offline.

🖥️ Online RC Renewal Process
You can apply for RC renewal through the Parivahan Sewa (VAHAN) portal.

1️⃣ Step 1: Fill Out the Online Application
🔹 Visit Parivahan.gov.in.
🔹 Select "RC Renewal".
🔹 Enter your Vehicle Registration Number and Chassis Number.

2️⃣ Step 2: Upload Required Documents
✅ Original RC (Registration Certificate)
✅ Pollution Under Control (PUC) Certificate
✅ Valid Vehicle Insurance
✅ Fitness Certificate (from RTO Test)
✅ Owner’s Aadhaar Card / PAN Card

3️⃣ Step 3: Pay Fees Online
💰 RC Renewal Charges:

Bike – ₹1,000 - ₹1,500
Car – ₹3,000 - ₹5,000
Commercial Vehicle – ₹10,000 - ₹15,000
✅ Use Net Banking, UPI, Debit, or Credit Card for payment.

4️⃣ Step 4: Book a Slot for Fitment Test
✔️ Schedule a Fitment Test at your nearest Regional Transport Office (RTO).

5️⃣ Step 5: Visit RTO for Inspection
🚦 RTO officers will inspect:

Engine condition
Pollution control compliance
Brakes, lights, and safety features
✅ After passing the test, download your new RC online!

📍 Offline RC Renewal Process
If you prefer to apply offline, follow these steps at your nearest RTO office:

1️⃣ Get the RC Renewal Form (Form 25) from the RTO.
2️⃣ Fill out the form and attach the required documents.
3️⃣ Pay the applicable renewal fee at the RTO counter.
4️⃣ Get your vehicle inspected in the Fitment Test.
5️⃣ After clearance, collect your renewed RC certificate.

📌 Required Documents for RC Renewal
📂 Mandatory Documents:
✅ Original RC (Registration Certificate)
✅ Valid Vehicle Insurance
✅ PUC Certificate (Pollution Certificate)
✅ Aadhaar Card or PAN Card
✅ Fitness Certificate from RTO

📌 How Long Does It Take to Get a Renewed RC?
📅 Processing Time:
🔹 Online & offline RC renewal takes 7-15 days.
🔹 If all documents are correct, you may get the RC sooner.
🔹 Urgent processing is available for faster renewal.

📌 New Rules & Updates for RC Renewal in 2024
🚨 Latest Government Regulations:
✅ Digital RC renewal process is now quicker & transparent.
✅ Older vehicles (15+ years) must meet strict pollution control norms.
✅ Special benefits available for Electric Vehicles (EVs).

📌 What If You Don’t Renew Your RC?
❌ You cannot legally drive your vehicle.
❌ Traffic police can fine you or seize your vehicle.
❌ You cannot sell or transfer ownership of the vehicle.

✔️ Ensure timely RC renewal to avoid legal trouble!

📌 Key Takeaways: How to Renew RC After 15 Years?
🎯 RC renewal is now easier than ever!
✔️ Apply online for a hassle-free process.
✔️ Complete the Fitment Test at your nearest RTO.
✔️ Keep all necessary documents ready.
✔️ Avoid delays to prevent fines or legal issues.

#VehicleDocuments #DrivingLegally

channel_about:
Nusta Fir is a Marathi YouTube channel in which we show travel videos in the Marathi language.
Here we do videos on the best picnic spots, forts, social events, traditions, local food you get during the trip, and much more!

Please subscribe for wanderlust travel, food vlogs, and informative videos/Vlogs !!!
We make travel videos, travel advice, travel vlogs, local food vlogs/videos, life vlogs, social videos!

नुसता फिर हा मराठी यूट्यूब चॅनेल आहे ज्यात आम्ही मराठी भाषेमध्ये ट्रॅव्हल व्हिडिओ दाखवतो. 
येथे आम्ही बेस्ट पिकनिक स्पॉट्स, किल्ले, सामाजिक कार्यक्रम, परंपरा , प्रवासा दरम्यान मिळणारे तेथील स्थानिक अन्न पदार्थ आणि बरेच काही उपक्रम 
चित्रित करून माहिती देतो. 
आम्ही प्रवासी व्हिडिओ, प्रवासाचा सल्ला, ट्रॅव्हल व्लॉग्स, स्थानिक अन्न पदार्थ, लाइफ व्हीलॉग्स, सोशल व्हिडिओ बनवतो!

Click here to watch our food-related videos - shorturl.at/cejIS

Click here to watch all traveling-related videos - shorturl.at/fiuR5

videos.title: MangalDas Market: The Ultimate Shopping Guide 2025
videos.description:
MangalDas Market: The Ultimate Shopping Guide 2025 #shopping #mumbaimarket #mangaldasmarket #mangaldasmarketshoppingguide #localtreasure 

Welcome to our comprehensive shopping guide to Mangaldas Market, Mumbai's iconic textile hub! Whether you're a first-time visitor or a seasoned shopper, this video will walk you through everything you need to know about Mangaldas Market in 2025.

🧵 **What to Expect:**

* **Vibrant Fabric Selections:** Explore a vast array of textiles, including silks, cottons, brocades, and more, perfect for creating custom garments.
* **Ready-Made & Semi-Stitched Attire:** While primarily known for fabrics, Mangaldas Market also offers a selection of ready-made and semi-stitched ethnic wear, including sarees, lehengas, kurtis, and chaniya cholis.
* **Wholesale Prices:** Enjoy competitive prices, especially when buying in bulk, making it a favorite among retailers and brides-to-be.

📍 **Location:** Situated in Kalbadevi, South Mumbai, Mangaldas Market is easily accessible via local trains to Byculla station, followed by a short auto-rickshaw ride. 

🎯 **Top Tips:**

Bargain Wisely:** Engage in friendly negotiations to secure the best deals.
* **Check Quality:** Inspect fabrics for any defects, especially when purchasing in bulk.
* **Visit During Off-Peak Hours:** To avoid crowds, plan your visit during weekdays.

🔍 **Frequently Asked Questions:**

1. **Is Mangaldas Market open on Sundays?**

   * No, the market is Closed on Sundays.

2. **Can I find ready-made clothing here?**

   * While the market specializes in fabrics, some shops offer ready-made and semi-stitched garments. 

3. **What is the best time to visit?**

   * Weekdays, preferably in the morning, are ideal to avoid heavy crowds. 

4. **How do I reach Mangaldas Market?**

   * Take a local train to Byculla station, then opt for an auto-rickshaw to the market. 

5. **Are there food options nearby?**

   * Yes, the market area boasts numerous street food vendors offering local delicacies.

channel_about:
AutoCraves is an Indian automotive channel where cars are explained with
facts, fun and feelings.

Here you’ll find:
• Cars that shaped India
• Relatable ownership stories
• Middle-class buyer POV
• Practical car & two-wheeler insights

The delivery is dramatic, sometimes over-exaggerated —
but the goal is simple: make automobiles easy, honest and interesting
for everyday Indian viewers.

For collaborations & media:
📩 autocraves@gmail.com

channel_about:
Hello, I am sharing videos about diecast cars. I'm a YouTube Content Creator I usually do unboxing videos of Miniature models of real life cars but not only that I do make videos on other topics like tutorials, DIY, Unboxing of gadgets and much more..I love this hobby. I share my products with you and present them to your liking. I try to produce the best quality content as possible. One of the biggest reasons for this is to give a lot of value. I work to make each of my videos better than the last. I hope it appeals to you. I share the world's best quality diecast cars. Thank you so much in advance for watching. I would also be happy if you support me by following. Have a nice time everyone. 
#diecastcars, #modelcars, #modelcar, #car, #miniaturecars, #miniaturecar, #toycar, #diecastcollection, #toycars, #diecast, #cars, #unboxing

This vision became a reality when the academy was launched, providing high-performance cricket coaching that not only caters to cricketers but also to cricketers from around the world. Welcome to the Thane Rising Cricket Academy channel! Our channel
is dedicated to providing high-quality cricket training and coaching
videos to help young cricketers improve their skills and become the
best players they can be. Our team of experienced coaches and
players will provide you with expert tips and advice to take your game
to the next level.
In our videos, you'll learn everything from the basics of batting,
bowling, and fielding to advanced techniques such as spin bowling,
power hitting, and tactical strategies. We'll also share our experiences
and insights from the world of cricket, including interviews with
professional players, analysis of top matches, and behind-the-scenes
glimpses of the sport.
Whether you're just starting out in cricket or looking to refine your
skills, the Thane Rising Cricket Academy channel is the perfect
resource for you. So be sure to subscribe to our channel and hit the

channel_about:
Welcome to White Collar Business — Honest Real Estate Reviews.

We are a real estate developer first. Our construction company, White Collar Developers, has been building homes since 1999, successfully delivering 39+ projects where 4,500+ families are happily living today. Currently, we are developing 5+ projects in the Vasai–Virar region.

This channel was started to share real, practical insights about property buying. Here, we review budget-friendly residential projects across Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane, Dombivli, Kalyan, Badlapur, and nearby locations in Maharashtra.

Our focus is simple — we review projects, we do not promote them.

Because we develop our own projects, we understand construction quality, pricing, and ground realities, and we aim to give viewers a clear and honest reality check before they make a property decision.

Every month, we also share updates and reviews of our own ongoing projects.

For any Queries please contact 978-169-1999

videos.title: Exploring the Vibrant Sights and Sounds of Lohar Chawl Market in Mumbai | India Walking Tour 4K HDR
videos.description:
Walking Tour in Mumbai - Join us on a vibrant walking tour through Mumbai's iconic Lohar Chawl Market, renowned for its dazzling array of artificial flowers and festive decorations. As the Ganesh Festival approaches, the market comes alive with a riot of colors and intricate designs, making it a must-visit for anyone looking to experience the true spirit of Mumbai during this festive season.
In this 4K HDR video, we explore the bustling streets filled with vendors offering everything from beautifully crafted flower garlands to unique festival decorations. You'll witness the energy, the craftsmanship, and the cultural richness that make this market a favorite for locals preparing for the grand celebrations.
Whether you're a fan of street markets, interested in Indian festivals, or simply love exploring new places, this walking tour offers a glimpse into the heart of Mumbai's vibrant culture. 
Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more immersive tours!

Thanks for watching
@lifeambience
#lifewalkanddrive

videos.title: Best Shops to Visit in Mangaldas Market Mumbai - Bazaars of India || Episode 1
videos.description:
Welcome to Episode 1 of Bazaars of India!
In this episode, I take you through Mangaldas Market, Mumbai - one of the biggest and most iconic fabric and suit markets in India.
I’ve explored multiple lanes and shops to bring you a curated list of the best stores so you don’t have to waste time going to every single shop.
From daily-wear suit sets to premium fabrics, bridal materials, and readymade pieces, Mangaldas truly has it all.
Watch till the end to shop smarter on your next shopping trip!

Don’t forget to subscribe for more episodes of Bazaars of India.
